plugins.name: asm-analysis
plugins.description: Compile -> objdump -> simdref annotate -> simdref profile pipeline. Finds hot loops from perf/VTune/uProf/llvm-mca, cites latency/CPI from uops.info, proposes intrinsic-level rewrites. Triggers on 'why is this slow', 'vectorise this', 'look at the asm', and other performance prompts.
